feat(backend)!: Map for exchange rates in the memory (#11914)

# Motivation

We want to start fetching the exchange rate in the backend.

In this PR, we create the stable memory dedicated to the tokens and
their exchange rate, and we create the methods to fetch the data.

As per implementation design, we will use a list of "active" tokens:
tokens that were touched in the last N minutes by the user.

BREAKING CHANGE: New types and new methods in the backend.

# Note

These data will be open to all users, so we can reduce the overhead, and
try and reduce the number of calls for the same token price.

# Changes

- Add ExchangeRateMap to stable memory: `StoredTokenId` vs
`ExchangeRate`.
- Validation of candid structure for new data.
- Method to fetch the price by token ID.

# Tests

Created tests.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix PY260 JPEG output via SCCB reset workaround

The pre-compiled mega_ccm driver's set_pixformat() doesn't properly reset
the PY260 sensor, leaving it stuck in raw YUV422 mode. This commit adds:

- Direct SCCB register writes to reset PY260 with correct timing (100ms
  hold + 1500ms settle) and configure JPEG mode, resolution, and quality
- Patched cam_hal.c with 512KB JPEG receive buffer (default formula was
  too small for PY260 output) and diagnostic counters for debugging
- Private esp32-camera headers (cam_hal.h, ll_cam.h) required by the
  cam_hal.c override
- Production settings: VGA resolution, high quality, double-buffered
- Updated README with technical documentation

Tested: /capture returns 27KB JPEG, /stream delivers MJPEG, /status
returns JSON. All endpoints verified working on hardware.

* fix: language-aware URL navigation across all pages — v1.5.1

Root causes fixed:
- All pages/HTML files used relative CSS paths (../assets/css/style.css)
  which resolved to 404 on language-prefixed URLs (/en/, /pl/, etc.)
  → Changed all paths to absolute (/assets/css/style.css)
- index.html used relative JS paths (assets/js/lang.js) causing blank
  page on /en/ and other lang-prefixed root URLs
  → Changed all JS paths to absolute
- adjustNavLinks() used isLocal check instead of pretty URL detection,
  causing nav and footer links to lose language prefix when navigating
  → Replaced isLocal with usePrettyUrls = !pathname.includes('.html')
  → Extended to update ALL internal links (not just nav IDs)
- Language switcher did not persist language to localStorage before
  navigating, so switching back to German showed old language on reload
  → Added localStorage.setItem() before window.location.href navigation
- Contact form redirect (sendmail.php) hardcoded /pages/bestaetigung.html
  → Now uses language-aware redirect (/hu/bestaetigung etc.)
- /bestaetigung pretty URL was missing from .htaccess rewrite rules
  → Added RewriteRule for /bestaetigung → /pages/bestaetigung.html

New test suite: tests/e2e/lang-navigation.spec.ts (76 tests)
- CSS/JS asset loading on lang-prefixed pages
- Nav and footer link language prefix retention
- Language switcher URL navigation (all directions incl. back to German)

commit.message:
Add unified read-only browse page across all workspaces (#91)

* Initial plan

* feat: add unified workspace admin browse page at /admin/moderate-all

Co-authored-by: mushon <27123+mushon@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: implement multi-select filters for workspaces and statuses in admin browse page

* feat: enhance admin workspace management with multi-select filters and improved navigation

* feat: implement multi-select and bulk edit functionality in admin moderation view

* feat: Implement multi-workspace support in moderation component

- Updated `moderate.component.ts` to handle multi-workspace mode, including workspace selection and filtering.
- Added new UI elements in `moderate.component.less` for workspace dropdown and breadcrumbs.
- Refactored item moderation methods to accommodate workspace-specific credentials.
- Introduced `admin-lightbox` component for improved item viewing experience with navigation controls.
- Created `proxy.conf.json` for API proxying during development.
- Updated routing to direct `/admin/all` to `ModerateComponent` with multi-workspace data.

* feat: Refactor lightbox navigation with new component and loading indicators

* feat: Implement lazy loading for images and add skeleton loader component

* feat: Enhance workspace moderation with improved item selection and moderation updates

* feat: Enhance thumbnail interactions with hover effects and workspace highlighting

* feat: Update workspace tooltip positioning and styling for better visibility

* feat: Implement image cropping functionality in admin image replacement modal

* feat: Add showcase export functionality with modal and export cache

- Implemented a modal for exporting filtered items to showcase with layout and clustering options.
- Added a service to cache export data temporarily to avoid passing large datasets via URL parameters.
- Enhanced workspace name display with emojis indicating visibility and collaboration status.
- Updated UI components to include export buttons and modal interactions.
- Refactored workspace name handling to utilize utility functions for consistency.
- Improved styling for new components and buttons for better user experience.

* feat: Remove sidebar open transformation from lightbox styles

* feat: Enhance AI regeneration functionality with multiple methods for moderators

* feat: Implement server-side export manifest service for multi-workspace showcase

* fix: Remove stray AI-generated planning documents from repo root

Remove GLOBAL_EDITING_GUIDE.md, IMPLEMENTATION_IMPROVEMENTS.md, and
ISSUE_EXPORT_MANIFEST_BACKEND.md which are ephemeral working artifacts
that should not be committed to the repository.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Remove misplaced duplicate lightbox-nav-controls component

Delete the skeleton duplicate at the incorrect nested path
projects/app/src/app/projects/app/src/app/admin/lightbox-nav-controls/
which was never imported or referenced anywhere. The real component
lives at projects/app/src/app/admin/lightbox-nav-controls/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Replace @HostListener with host binding in moderate-all component

Move document:click handler from @HostListener decorator to the host
object in @Component decorator, per project coding standards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Remove explicit standalone: true from Angular v20+ components

standalone is the default in Angular v20+, so setting it explicitly
is unnecessary per project coding standards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Extract shared EnrichedItem interface to workspace-metadata.interface.ts

Consolidate the duplicated EnrichedItem definitions from moderate and
moderate-all components into a single shared interface with optional
enrichment fields, which works for both single-workspace and
multi-workspace contexts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: OnPush, inject(), remove debug logs, remove express import

- Add ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush to 5 components: showcase-export-modal,
  admin-lightbox, lightbox-nav-controls, skeleton-loader, moderate
- Replace constructor injection with inject() in showcase-export-modal
- Remove 35 debug console.log statements from image-replacement-modal
- Remove spurious `import e from 'express'` in showcase-ws component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Enhance bulk edit functionality with tag management and improved UI components

* refactor: Part A quick fixes and Part B shared moderation helpers

- LazyLoadImageDirective: add OnDestroy cleanup for observer and load listener
- ExportCacheService: extract isExpired() helper, hasValidExport() no longer
  triggers clearExport() side effect
- Extract 24+ duplicated methods and constants from moderate.component.ts
  and moderate-all.component.ts into shared moderation-helpers.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Add pagination for multi-workspace loading in moderate-all

When a workspace returns exactly 500 items (page_size), subsequent pages
are fetched in the background and appended to allItems. A loadingMore
signal indicates background loading is in progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Clean up subscription leaks and console.log in showcase-ws

- Replace destroy$ Subject with takeUntilDestroyed(destroyRef) for all
  subscriptions including polling loop, timers, and HTTP calls
- Store event listener references and remove them all in ngOnDestroy
  (hashchange, resize, keydown were previously leaked)
- Remove ~40 debug console.log statements, keeping console.error/warn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Remove proxy.conf.json and revert styles.less overflow change

- proxy.conf.json was unused dead config (not wired into angular.json)
- Revert overflow: auto back to overflow: hidden in global styles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Revert admin-api.service.ts localhost proxy and error handling changes, revert styles.less

Keep only the new createItem method. Revert the localhost proxy URL
conditional and the getItems catchError change back to original.
Also properly revert styles.less overflow change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Revert showcase-ws to main, keep only subscription leak and listener fixes

Reverted all functional changes (multi-workspace export, layout
refactoring, grid layout stub, SVG drag callback removal, filter
simplification). Kept only:
- destroy$ Subject replaced with takeUntilDestroyed(destroyRef)
- Event listener cleanup in ngOnDestroy (hashchange, resize, keydown)
- Safe created_at sort guard against non-string values
- circle-packing-layout-strategy.ts fully reverted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Remove proxy.conf.json reference from DEVELOPMENT_ENV.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Use /replace_image and /reanalyze_item endpoints instead of PUT /item

The old approach sent base64 data URLs via PUT /item for image replacement
and set undocumented flags (needs_processing, _reanalyze_image) for
re-analysis. These were non-functional server-side.

- Add replaceImage() and reanalyzeItem() methods to AdminApiService and ApiService
- Rewrite image-replacement-modal to POST image blob to /replace_image endpoint
- Add scanner replace flow: confirm component branches on replace_item query param
- Fix regenerateFromScratch() in both moderate components to use /reanalyze_item
- Fix setTagline/setDescription to chain reanalyzeItem after saving text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Remove showcase-export-modal and related references

Remove the showcase export modal component, export-cache service,
and all template/style references that were causing CI build failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Use thumbnail images in moderate grid/list views

Add thumbnailUrl() helper that converts .screenshot.jpeg URLs to
.screenshot.thumbnail.jpeg for faster loading in grid and list views.
Full-size images are still used in the lightbox.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Pre-compute thumbnail URLs at load time instead of in templates

Compute screenshot_thumbnail_url once when items are loaded/enriched,
avoiding repeated thumbnailUrl() calls on every change detection cycle.
Also update onImageReplaced to set thumbnail URL on replace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Fix code review issues — setTagline data corruption, missing thumbnails, crop coordinates

- Fix setTagline() overwriting future_scenario_description with tagline value
- Add screenshot_thumbnail_url to items in loadRemainingPages() for page 2+
- Use naturalWidth/naturalHeight for jscanify crop coordinate mapping
- Remove proxyConfig reference to non-existent proxy.conf.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Guard window access with PlatformService.browser() for SSR prerendering

- settings-panel: guard window.innerWidth in panelX signal initializer
- canvas-creator: guard window.innerWidth in computed, wrap fromEvent(window)
  calls in constructor with browser() check
- evaluation-sidebar: guard window.location.host in effect
- about: skip HTTP fetch during SSR to avoid ng-localhost failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Fix thumbnail URL replacement to match actual filename pattern

The screenshot URLs end with /screenshot.jpeg (no leading dot), so
the old .screenshot.jpeg replacement never matched. Use regex
anchored to end of string instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Apply URL domain fix in moderate-all before generating thumbnail URLs

moderate-all was generating thumbnail URLs from the raw Firebase Storage
domain where thumbnails don't exist. Now applies the same domain rewrite
(chronomaps3.firebasestorage.app → chronomaps3-eu) before generating
thumbnail URLs, matching the moderate component's behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Fix crop editor initialization and replace image item_key

- Use _key field instead of item_key for replace image API call
- Default crop handles to 25%/75% lines for better visibility
- Wait for image load event before initializing crop corners

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* moderate all component no more

* feat: Add replace_image and reanalyze_item support to ApiService and confirm flow

Adds replaceImage() and reanalyzeItem() methods to ApiService for the scanner
replace flow. Updates confirm component to branch on replaceItemId for replacing
existing items instead of creating new ones. Fixes image-replacement-modal to
use proper blob conversion for all image sources.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: Replace window.addEventListener with fromEvent and takeUntilDestroyed

Replaces manual addEventListener/removeEventListener pairs with RxJS fromEvent
piped through takeUntilDestroyed (showcase-ws component) and takeUntil with a
destroy$ subject (three-renderer service). Removes unused bound handler
properties and manual cleanup in ngOnDestroy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
